sitemaps.title: Sitemaps
sitemaps.description: URLs or local filenames of XML sitemaps to be warmed up.

urls.title: URLs
urls.description: Additional URLs to be warmed up.

excludePatterns.title: Exclude patterns
excludePatterns.description: Patterns of URLs to be excluded from cache warmup.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Limit the number of URLs to be processed.

progress.title: Progress bar
progress.description: Show a progress bar during cache warmup.

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.description: FQCN of the crawler to use for cache warmup.

strategy.title: Crawling strategy
strategy.description: Optional crawling strategy to prepare URLs before crawling them.

format.title: Format
format.description: The formatter used to print the cache warmup result.

logFile.title: Log file
logFile.description: A file where to log crawling results.

logLevel.title: Log level
logLevel.description: The log level used to determine which crawling results to log.

allowFailures.title: Allow failures
allowFailures.description: Allow failures during URL crawling and exit with zero.

stopOnFailure.title: Stop on failure
stopOnFailure.description: Cancel further cache warmup requests on failure.

repeatAfter.title: Endless mode
repeatAfter.description: Run cache warmup in endless loop and repeat x seconds after each run.
